# Topline Plumbing 530

> Professional Plumbing Services in Northern California

## Business Information

- **Company**: Topline Plumbing 530
- **Phone**: (530) 768-9446
- **Email**: Toplineplumbingredding@gmail.com
- **Service Area**: Northern California (530 area code)
- **Established**: 1998
- **Rating**: 4.9 stars (427+ reviews)
- **Licenses**: Licensed, Bonded & Insured California Plumber

## Services Offered

### Emergency Services
- 24/7 Emergency Plumbing
- Burst Pipe Repair
- Gas Leak Detection
- Flood Response
- Average Response Time: 60 minutes

### Water Heater Services
- Water Heater Repair
- Water Heater Replacement
- Tankless Water Heater Installation
- Same-Day Service Available
- Service Starting at $127

### Drain & Sewer
- Drain Cleaning
- Sewer Line Clearing
- Clogged Drain Repair
- Power Auger Service
- Service Starting at $130

### Additional Services
- Repiping Services (PEX & Copper)
- Fixture Installation (Sinks, Toilets, Faucets, Showers)
- Leak Detection & Repair
- Residential & Commercial Plumbing

## Service Areas

Topline Plumbing 530 serves the following cities in Northern California:

1. **Chico** (Butte County)
2. **Redding** (Shasta County)
3. **Yuba City** (Sutter County)
4. **Marysville** (Yuba County)
5. **Paradise** (Butte County)
6. **Oroville** (Butte County)
7. **Red Bluff** (Tehama County)
8. **Anderson** (Shasta County)
9. **South Lake Tahoe** (El Dorado County)
10. **Truckee** (Nevada County)
11. **Grass Valley** (Nevada County)
12. **Auburn** (Placer County)

## Key Features

- **Same-Day Service**: Available for most repairs
- **Upfront Pricing**: No hidden fees
- **24/7 Availability**: Real person answers, no voicemail
- **Fully Stocked Trucks**: Most repairs completed on-site
- **Licensed Professionals**: All plumbers are CA licensed
- **100% Satisfaction Guarantee**

## Why Choose Topline Plumbing?

1. **Local Expertise**: Serving Northern California for 15+ years
2. **Fast Response**: 60-minute average emergency response time
3. **Quality Work**: 4.9-star rating from 427+ satisfied customers
4. **Transparent**: Upfront pricing before work begins
5. **Professional**: Licensed, bonded, and insured
6. **Available**: 24/7 emergency service, same-day appointments

## Common Plumbing Issues We Fix

- Burst pipes and leaks
- Clogged drains and toilets
- Water heater failures
- Sewer backups
- Gas leaks
- Low water pressure
- Fixture installations
- Pipe replacements
- Emergency flooding

## Pricing

- **Drain Cleaning**: Starting at $130
- **Water Heater Service**: Starting at $127
- **Emergency Service**: Available 24/7
- **Free Estimates**: Available
- **Upfront Pricing**: No surprises

## Website Structure

- **Homepage**: Overview of services
- **Services Pages**: Detailed service information
  - /services/emergency
  - /services/water-heater-repair
  - /services/drain-cleaning
  - /services/tankless
- **Service Area Pages**: Location-specific information for all 12 cities
  - /areas/[city-name]
- **About**: Company information
- **Contact**: Contact form and information
